Id1.text: Humphrys, Tennant and Dykes are located in Deptford and power the Alhambra.

Id2.text: Humphrys, Tennant & Dykes is in Deptford and the Alhambra is powered by one of their engines.

Id3.text: The Alhambra is powered by a Humphrys, Tennant and Dykes engine, they are located in Deptford.
